items.title: Filter-based feature selection
items.description: Rank features by I(X_i; Y) before training. Features with near-zero MI with the label rarely help prediction and can be removed to reduce dimensionality and overfitting risk.

items.title: Redundancy detection between features
items.description: High I(X_i; X_j) flags duplicate or proxy columns (e.g., height in cm vs inches). Drop one member of a high-MI pair to simplify models and improve interpretability.

items.title: Clustering evaluation (NMI)
items.description: Normalized mutual information compares predicted clusters to ground-truth labels, rewarding partitions that agree up to permutation of cluster IDs—common in unsupervised learning benchmarks.

items.title: Information bottleneck and representation learning
items.description: Train encoders T = f(X) to maximize I(T; Y) while limiting I(X; T), compressing inputs while preserving label-relevant information—used in deep representation learning theory and some self-supervised objectives.
